  "rationale": {
    "R1.6": "The request to 'Clean this up' centers on sentence-level grammar, concision, and flow without altering content.",
    "RX.1": "Maintain appropriate hedging and transparently handle any uncertainty introduced by language changes.",
    "RX.2": "Avoid strengthening claims or novelty beyond what the provided abstract supports.",
    "RX.3": "Constrain work to polishing the existing text without adding, removing, or reinterpreting substantive content.",
    "RX.4": "Ensure edits do not mislead about evaluation results, metrics, or applicability, preventing downstream misuse.",
    "RX.5": "Preserve original terminology, dataset and metric names, and numeric results to retain traceability to the source."
  }
}

rationale.R1.6: The request to 'Clean this up' centers on sentence-level grammar, concision, and flow without altering content.
rationale.RX.1: Maintain appropriate hedging and transparently handle any uncertainty introduced by language changes.
rationale.RX.2: Avoid strengthening claims or novelty beyond what the provided abstract supports.
rationale.RX.3: Constrain work to polishing the existing text without adding, removing, or reinterpreting substantive content.
rationale.RX.4: Ensure edits do not mislead about evaluation results, metrics, or applicability, preventing downstream misuse.
rationale.RX.5: Preserve original terminology, dataset and metric names, and numeric results to retain traceability to the source.
